query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_variants,
  SUM(CASE WHEN package_length IS NULL OR package_width IS NULL OR package_height IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_dimensions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN package_length IS NOT NULL AND package_width IS NOT NULL AND package_height IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_dimensions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gross_weight IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_gross_weight,
  SUM(CASE WHEN net_weight IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_net_weight,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pieces_per_box IS NULL OR pieces_per_box = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_pieces_per_box
FROM product_variants
WHERE is_archived = 0;
